description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency group based on the GitHub reference and allow cancellation of in-progress jobs for non-master and non-release branches. The workflow consists of three jobs: build-native, build-compiler, and test-compiler. The build-native job builds native artifacts on multiple platforms (macOS, Linux, Windows) with different configurations. The build-compiler job depends on build-native and builds .NET compiler artifacts on multiple platforms. The test-compiler job depends on build-compiler and runs tests on multiple platforms.
